steps.title: Complete the square
steps.content:
Move the constant term to the other side, then add $25$ to both sides.
$$w^2+10w=20$$
$$w^2+10w+25=45$$
$$(w+5)^2=45$$

steps.title: Match the listed solution
steps.content: Of the two solutions, only $-5+3\sqrt{5}$ appears in the choices. The answer is D.
